title: Participating Organizations
description: Registry of organizations participating in PXL Classroom. Lives on the participating-orgs branch of the hub.

login.description: GitHub login of the participating organization.

budget_owner_login.description: GitHub login of the budget owner. Used for @-mention in weekly usage report issues.

budget_owner_email.description: Optional informational email for the budget owner. Not used by the system for delivery; @-mention to budget_owner_login is the delivery channel.

overrides.description: Per-org SKU overrides. Map of SKU name to override limit in the SKU's unit. Overrides global limits.yml.
